loan_origination.reason_for_calling: Process loan application interest and collect basic requirements.
loan_origination.conversation_text: Agent: Hello, am I speaking with Suresh? User: Yes, Suresh speaking. Agent: I see you expressed interest in our home loan scheme. User: Yes, I am planning to buy a flat in Noida. Agent: What is the loan amount you are looking for? User: Around 50 lakhs. Agent: What is your monthly income? User: 1.2 lakhs per month. Agent: Great, I will forward this to our executive. Can we email you details? User: Yes, suresh@example.com.

items.name: Eligible Lead
items.description: Meets salary and loan amount ratio.

custom_question.question: What is the desired loan amount?

templates.title: Home Loan Details
templates.description: Information guide and application form link for home loans
templates.subject: Your Home Loan Inquiry - {{company_name:"Star Finance"}}

emi_payment_reminders.reason_for_calling: Remind customer about upcoming or overdue EMI payment.
emi_payment_reminders.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Rajesh, calling from Star Finance. User: Yes, tell me. Agent: This is a reminder that your car loan EMI of 15,000 INR is due on 25th June. User: Okay, I have set up auto-debit. Agent: Perfect, it will be debited automatically. Thank you.

debt_loan_recovery.conversation_text: Agent: Hello, is this Anil? User: Yes, who is this? Agent: I am calling from recovery department regarding your personal loan. The payment is overdue by 45 days. User: I had a medical emergency, I can pay by next Friday. Agent: Okay, we will note down your promise to pay by next Friday. Please pay 20,000 INR.

items.name: Promise to Pay
items.description: Agreed to pay by a specific date.

credit_card_insurance_sales.reason_for_calling: Offer pre-approved credit card or insurance policy.
credit_card_insurance_sales.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Monica, calling from Prime Bank. User: Hello. Agent: You are pre-approved for our Platinum Card with zero annual fee. User: Does it have lounge access? Agent: Yes, 4 free domestic lounge visits per year. User: Sounds good, please send the application link. Agent: Sure, I will trigger the link to your phone. Thank you.

items.name: Lead Generated
items.description: Expressed interest and requested application link.

custom_question.question: Is the customer interested in lounge access?

templates.title: Platinum Credit Card Offer
templates.description: Application link and benefits list for Platinum credit card
templates.subject: Your Pre-approved Platinum Card Offer - {{company_name:"Prime Bank"}}

kyc_verification_call.reason_for_calling: Verify identity and address details for KYC.
kyc_verification_call.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Ramesh, calling from FinTech. We need to verify details for KYC. User: Yes. Agent: Can you confirm your date of birth? User: 15th August 1989. Agent: And your current zip code? User: 560001. Agent: Thank you, verification complete.

custom_question.question: What is the date of birth?
